verses.text: “Note in Topa na Pasian uh thu mangin, tuni-a kong gen ama thupiakna khempeuh limtakin na zuih uh leh Topa na Pasian un leitung minam dangte khempeuh sangin a lianzaw-in note hong bawl ding hi
Topa na Pasian uh thu na man' uh leh hih thuphate khempeuh note tungah hong tung ding hi
“Khuapi sungah thupha ngah mi na hi ding uh a, lote-ah zong thupha ngah mi mah na hi ding uh hi
“Note' sung pana piangte, leh na leitang uh pana piangte, leh na ganhing uh pana piang, na bawngte uh pungin na tuuhonte uh tungah thupha om ding hi
“Na seengte uh leh na annel mekna kuangte uhah thupha om ding hi
“Na sepna khempeuh uhah thupha na ngah ding uh hi
“ Topa in, note' langah hong pang na galte uh na mai uhah lelhna thuaksak ding hi. Amaute lampi khat tawnin hong kuan ding uh a, note' mai panin lam sagih tawnin taikeek ding uh hi
“ Topa in note' ansal tung leh na hihna khempeuh uhah thupha hong puak ding hi. Topa na Pasian un note hong piakna leitangah amah in note tungah thupha hong pia ding hi
“Note in Topa na Pasian uh hong thupiaknate zui-in ama lampi na tot uh leh amah in note tungah hong ciamsa bangin ama-a' dingin a siangtho mi dingin Topa in note hong kipsak ding hi
Topa in note hong sapna thu midang khempeuh in thei ding uh a, amaute in note hong kihta ding uh hi

Note piak dingin na pu na pate uh tungah Topa in a ciamsa gam sungah note' sung pana piangte, na gan khawi pan uha piangte, leh na leitang pan uha piangte-ah Topa in note nakpi takin hong hausak ding hi

Note' leitangah ama hunin guah a zusak ding leh na sepna khempeuh uh thupha a pia dingin Topa in a na hoih kholna vantung note hong hon' ding hi. Note in minam tampite tungah leitawi na pia ding uh a, ahih hangin note in leitawi na la kei ding uh hi

Note in tuni-a kong thugente limtakin zuihna tawh Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate mangin, tuni-a no kong thupiakna kammalte panin, pasian dangte' na semin a bia dingin na pial kei nak uh leh, Topa in a makai-in note hong bawl ding a, mi' nung zui-in hong bawllo ding hi. Tunglam bekah na kah ding uh a, na nuaikiat ngei kei ding uh hi.

“Ahih hangin note in Topa na Pasian uh thu mangloin, tuni-a kong gen ama thupiaknate leh ama thukhamte khempeuh limtakin na zuih kei uh leh, hih samsiatna khempeuh note tungah hong tung ding a, note hong ban ding hi
“Khuapi sungah hong kisamsia ding a, lo-ah zong hong kisamsia ding hi
“Na lawhte uh leh na annel mekna kuangte un zong samsiatna ngah ding hi
“Note' sung pana piangte leh na leitang uh pana piangte, na bawngte uh leh na tuuhon note uh in zong samsiatna ngah ding hi
“Na sep na bawlna khempeuh uhah hamsia na ngah ding uh hi
“Note in Topa na nusiat uh a, na gamtatsiat uh leh, note sia-in na sihmang khit matengun Topa in note tungah samsiatna, buaina, cihmawhnate hong tungsak ding hi
A luah dingin na lutna uh leitang panin note hong beisak matengin note lakah pulnatna a tun'na dingin Topa in bawl ding hi
Topa in pulnatna leh cisa natna, meima nasia leh a sa mahmah keutumna, huihpi' mutgawpna leh a nom tawh note hong vatgawp ding a, note na sih matengun tuate na thuak ding uh hi
Na lu tung uha om vantungte pen sumngo bangin sanin guah zulo ding a, na nuai uha om leitung pen sik bangin sak ding hi
Topa in na gamsung uha guahte tangdingin leivui leh sehnel hong zusak ding a, note na sih matengun vantung panin note tungah tuate hong kiasuk ding hi

“ Topa in na galte uh mai-ah note hong guallelsak ding hi. Amaute a do dingin lam khatah na kuan khawm ding uh a, amau' mai-ah lam sagihin na taikeek ding uh hi. Leitung kumpi gamte khempeuh' muhna-ah note a cikzethuai na hi ding uh hi
Note' luanghawmte pen huih laka leeng vasate khempeuh leh leitunga ganhingte khempeuh' an hi ding a, tuate a bengkhia ding mihing omlo ding hi
Topa in note na damkik theihlohna ding uh Egypt meimatumte leh meima daite, meima lipneite leh cithak tawh note hong vatgawp ding hi
Topa in haina, mittawtna, leh lungsim buaina tawh note hong vatgawp ding hi

Mittawte in khuamial lakah khua a zawt bangin sunin khua na zawt ding uh a, na hihnate uhah na mavang kei ding uh hi. Note hong kinengniamin na tate uh hong kisut niloh ding a, note hong huh ding kuamah omlo ding hi
“Zi dingin lawm khat na dong ding uh a, midang khat in na luppih ding hi. Inn na lam ding uh a, tua sungah na teng kei ding uh hi. Leenggui lo na zuan ding uh a, a gah na ne kha kei ding uh hi

Na muh tangpi-un na bawngtal uh kigo ding a, a sa na ne kha kei ding uh hi. Note' mai panin na la uh hong kingawh laksak ding a, note kiangah hong kipia kik nawnlo ding hi. Na tuute uh na galte uh tungah kipia ding a, note hong huh ding kuamah omlo ding hi
Na tapate uh leh na tanute uh midang tungah kipia ding a, amaute ngai-in sun nilohin na mit un enin na mit uh gim ding hi. Tuate pen nomau' tha tawh na dalzawh ding uh hilo ding hi
Na theih nailoh uh minam khat in na leitang panun a piangte leh na nasepsa khempeuh uh ne tum ding a, note hong kinengniamin hong kisugawp tawntung lel ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin na mit un a muh ding nate in note hong hehsak mahmah ding hi
Topa in note na kidamsak kik theihloh ding uh a nasia mahmah meimatumte tawh na khukte uh leh na khete uh meimasak gawpin, na khenuai panun na luzang dong uhah na thuak ding uh hi

“Note leh na pu na pate un a theih ngeiloh minam khat kiangah Topa in note leh note tungah na koih uh na kumpipa uh hong tun'pih ding a, tua lai-ah singlesuang tawh a kibawl pasian dangte' na na sem ding uh hi
Topa in note hong paikhiatpihna mite lakah a cikzethuai, paunak, leh gentehna na suak ding uh hi
“Khaici tampi lo-ah na tuh ding uh a, ahi zongin tawmno bek na khawm ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kauphe in nemang ding hi
Note in leenggah lo zuanin na puah ding uh a, ahih hangin leenggahzu dawnloin, leenggah zong na ne kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh lung in tuate ne ding hi
Na gamsung khempeuh uhah oliv kung na nei ding uh a, ahih hangin a thau tawh note na kizut kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na oliv gahte uh pulh ding hi
Tanute leh tapate na nei ding uh a, ahih hangin amaute pen nomau-a' hilo ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute galmat suak ding uh hi
Na singte khempeuh uh leh, na leitang panun a piang khempeuh kauphete in tang ding uh hi
“Note lakah a om peemtate lian semsem ding uh a, note na neu semsem ding uh hi
Amaute in note' tungah leitawi hong pia ding uh a, note in amaute tungah leitawi na pia kei ding uh hi. Amaute a makai hi-in, note a nungzui na hi ding uh hi

“Amah in note hong piak thupiaknate leh thukhamte zuiloin, Topa na Pasian uh thu manglo na hih manun, note na sih matengun hih samsiatnate khempeuh note' tungah hong tungin, note hong delhin hong pha ding uh hi
Note leh na suanlekhakte uh tungah a tawntungin tuate pen lim leh na lamdang hi ding hi
Hih a tampi nate khempeuh om napi-in note in lungdamna leh lungsim kipahna tawh Topa note' Pasian' na semlo na hih manun

Topa in note' langah a hong sawl ding na galte uh' na, gilkialna leh dangtakna, pum guakin omna, leh na khempeuh kitangsapna tawh, na sem ding uh hi. Na galte un note hong suksiat matengin note' ngawngah sik hakkol hong thuah ding uh hi

Topa in a gamlapi leimong panin muvanlai leeng bangin a manlang, amau' pau na theihloh uh minam, thukhualna a neilo minam, khangham mite a zahtaklo, khangno mite tungah maipha zong a lak tuanlo minam khat, note' langkhatah hong paipih ding a

note na sih matengun amaute in na ganhon note uh leh na leitang panun a piang gahte hong neksak ding uh hi. Amaute in note hong beisak matengun note-a' dingin an, leenggahzu, ahih kei leh sathau, na ganhingte uh ahih kei leh na tuuhon note uh zong hong nusiatlo ding uh hi

Na gamsung uha a om na muan' uh, a sang a muan'huai na kulhpite uh a cip khit dong matengin note' khuapite khempeuh sungah amaute in note hong umcih ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un note hong piaksa na gamsung khempeuh uhah a om na khuapite khempeuh sung uhah note hong umcih ding uh hi
“Na galte un hong umcihna leh hong lungkhamsakna ding ahi na lungkham hun sung uhah Topa na Pasian un note a hong piaksa, na sung panun a piang na tanute uh leh na tapate uh' sate na ne ding uh hi
Note lakah a ngeksuak, a cithei pen mipa in a sanggampa, a it a zi, leh amah tawh a om a tate a nunung pen' tungah an pia nuamlo ding hi
Na khuapite khempeuh sung uhah hong umcihna leh na galte un note hong lungkhamsakna ding hun sungah bangmah kinei nawnlo ding ahih manin ama nek a tate' sate kuamah in midang hawm nuamlo ding hi

Note lakah a om a ngeksuak, a cithei pen numei, amah ngekin a ci neel lua ahih manin a khenuai tawh lei sik ding a ngaihsun ngei vetlo nu in a it a pasal, a tanute leh a tapate-a' dingin ama sung panin a piang a tate leh ama sung panin a paikhia a nau-nungzuite phallo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hong umcihna leh na galte un na khuapite uhah note hong lungkhamsakna ding lungkhamna sungah bangmah neihlohna hangin amah in tuate nesim ding hi
“Hih a minthang, a zahtakhuai min, Topa na Pasian uh na kihtak theihna dingun hih laibu sunga kigelh hih thute limtakin zuih ding na ngaihsut kei uh leh
Topa in note leh na suan na khakte uh tungah nasia-in sauvei a om gimna, gimna a tuan diak, leh a nasia, nat saute hong tungsak ding hi
Amah in note' kihtak Egypt natnate note' tungah hong tungsak kik ding a, note' tungah tuate kilawilo ding hi
Note na siat matengun hih thukham laibu sungah a kiciamtehlo natna leh gimna khempeuh zong Topa in no tungah hong tungsak ding hi
Note, vantung aksite zahin a tam na hihna sung uhah tawmno bek na pha ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh thu na mang kei uh hi

Topa in note tungah a hong bawlna leh note tampi hong phaksakna-ah nuam a sak mah bangin, note tungah siatna tun'sakna leh note suksiatna-ah zong Topa in nuamsa ding a, a luah dingin na lutna uh leitang panin note hong kilakhia ding hi

“ Topa in leimong khat panin mong khat, mi khempeuhte lakah note hong thehthang ding hi. Tua lai-ah note leh na pu na pate un a theih nailoh singlesuang tawh a kibawl pasian dangte' na na sem ding uh hi
Hih minamte lakah oltaka nuntakna na mu kei ding uh a, kiptaka na omna ding uh gam na nei kei ding uh hi. Topa in tua lai-ah lungsim lin'na, mit gimna, leh nuntak tha beina hong pia ding a
na nuntakna uh lunghimawhin na om tawntung ding uh hi. Sun leh zanin na lau ngitnget ding uh a, nuntak lungmuan'na na nei kei ding uh hi
Na lungsim un a kihtak launa leh na mit un a muh ding nate' hangin, zingsangin, ‘Nitak hi leh!’ na ci ding uh a, nitakin, ‘Zingsang hi leh!’ na ci ding uh hi

Note na zin kik ngei nawn kei ding uh hi, ci-in kong ciam khualzinna, Egypt gamah teembaw tawh Topa in note hong paipih kik ding hi. Tua lai-ah sila numei leh sila pasal dingin na galte uh tungah na kizuak ding uh a, ahih hangin kuamah in note hong leilo ding hi,” a ci hi.
